from __future__ import annotations

def repeated_pure_helper_call_on_same_input_without_local_cache_positive():
    def slugify(text: str) -> str:
        return "-".join(text.lower().split())
    value = "Product Name"
    items = []
    for _ in range(3):
        items.append(f"{slugify(value)}:{slugify(value)}")
    return items
